legs.label: Validate plan
legs.description: AX validates the EL5 build-plan schema, confirmed stubs, source hashes, and lexicon matches.

legs.label: Execute plan
legs.description: AX launches one build-atomic-card child run per write_new contract; the child workflow owns draft, validation, grading, revision, publish, and ledger events.

legs.label: Verify plan
legs.description: AX renders the final coverage audit after publish.
